characters.name: Guy Gur-Ari
characters.physicalDescription: A calm, confident man with olive skin, dark hair, light stubble, warm brown eyes. Wears a fitted button-down shirt with rolled sleeves and dark chinos.

locations.name: Tech Company Conference Room
locations.visualDescription: A sleek, modern Silicon Valley conference room. Floor-to-ceiling glass walls, long white composite table, ergonomic gray mesh chairs. Cool LED overhead lighting with soft natural daylight. Muted whites, light grays, soft blues.

shots.startFramePrompt: Wide shot of a man in a dark jacket walking down a grand hallway with pillars and warm lamps on a desk in the distance.
shots.endFramePrompt: Same wide shot, the man is closer to the reception desk in the grand hallway.
shots.actionPrompt: A man in a dark jacket walks away from the camera through a grand, dimly lit hallway with large pillars towards a reception desk.

shots.startFramePrompt: Medium shot of a security guard in a light-colored shirt sitting down in a dark room with a wall of security monitors.
shots.endFramePrompt: Same medium shot, the security guard is seated and looking at the monitors.
shots.actionPrompt: A man in a security uniform sits down at a desk in a dark room filled with many glowing security monitors.

shots.startFramePrompt: Close-up of a hand reaching into a brown paper bag.
shots.endFramePrompt: Same close-up, the hand is holding a wrapped sandwich pulled from the bag.
shots.actionPrompt: A hand reaches into a brown paper bag and pulls out a sandwich wrapped in a white paper towel.

shots.startFramePrompt: Close-up of a security guard in a light green uniform looking down at a sandwich in his hand.
shots.endFramePrompt: Same close-up, the security guard continues to look at the sandwich, his expression neutral.
shots.actionPrompt: A man in a security uniform looks down at a sandwich he is holding with a focused expression.

shots.startFramePrompt: Wide shot of a dark corridor with a person in the distance shining a flashlight towards the camera.
shots.endFramePrompt: Same wide shot, the flashlight beam has moved slightly as the person continues down the corridor.
shots.actionPrompt: A person walks down a long, dark, narrow corridor, shining a bright flashlight beam ahead.

shots.startFramePrompt: Close-up of the security guard's face, eyes looking slightly to the side.
shots.endFramePrompt: Same close-up, his gaze shifts slightly as he continues to scan the area.
shots.actionPrompt: A close-up of the security guard's face as he looks around vigilantly in a dimly lit hallway.

shots.startFramePrompt: Wide shot from the doorway of the monitor room, the security guard's silhouette in the foreground.
shots.endFramePrompt: Same wide shot, the security guard has walked further into the room towards the monitors.
shots.actionPrompt: The security guard enters the monitor room, seen from behind as he walks towards his desk.

shots.startFramePrompt: Extreme close-up of hands holding a sandwich, the background is out of focus.
shots.endFramePrompt: Same close-up, the hands shift the sandwich slightly.
shots.actionPrompt: Extreme close-up of hands holding a half-eaten sandwich in front of blurry security monitors.

shots.startFramePrompt: Medium shot of the security guard in his uniform, seated and looking down at his food.
shots.endFramePrompt: Same medium shot, he maintains his seated position with a slight change in facial expression.
shots.actionPrompt: The security guard sits at his desk, holding his sandwich and looking contemplative.

shots.startFramePrompt: Close-up of a hand reaching into the opening of a brown paper bag.
shots.endFramePrompt: Same close-up, the hand is now grasping a green apple inside the bag.
shots.actionPrompt: A hand reaches into the brown paper bag again and picks up a green apple.

shots.startFramePrompt: Close-up of a hand entering a brown paper bag.
shots.endFramePrompt: Same close-up, the hand is pulling out a small item wrapped in white paper.
shots.actionPrompt: Close-up of a hand reaching into a paper bag to retrieve a wrapped item.

shots.startFramePrompt: Close-up of the security guard's face, sandwich near his mouth.
shots.endFramePrompt: Same close-up, he has taken a bite and is chewing.
shots.actionPrompt: The security guard takes a bite of his sandwich while looking down.

shots.startFramePrompt: Close-up of a tablet screen on a desk, displaying a video with a 'prime' logo.
shots.endFramePrompt: Same close-up, the video on the tablet continues to play.
shots.actionPrompt: A tablet on the desk plays a video showing hands preparing food.

shots.startFramePrompt: Close-up of the security guard's face, eyes focused on a screen off-camera.
shots.endFramePrompt: Same close-up, he continues watching with a steady gaze.
shots.actionPrompt: The security guard watches the tablet intently while continuing to eat.

shots.startFramePrompt: Medium shot of the security guard at his desk, beginning to reach for a device.
shots.endFramePrompt: Same medium shot, his hand is extended further towards a laptop.
shots.actionPrompt: The security guard reaches across his desk towards a laptop while surrounded by monitors.

shots.startFramePrompt: Close-up of a laptop screen showing an Amazon Prime search results page for kitchenware.
shots.endFramePrompt: Same close-up, the screen remains static on the shopping page.
shots.actionPrompt: A laptop screen displays an online shopping page for a 'kitchen set' with a grill pan and knives.

shots.startFramePrompt: Close-up of the security guard's face, illuminated by the light of the laptop screen.
shots.endFramePrompt: Same close-up, his eyes move as if reading the screen, a slight smile forming.
shots.actionPrompt: The security guard looks at the laptop screen with an expression of interest and curiosity.

shots.startFramePrompt: Wide shot of a kitchen where the security guard is busy with several packages on a table.
shots.endFramePrompt: Same wide shot, he has opened one of the boxes and is looking inside.
shots.actionPrompt: The security guard stands in a brightly lit kitchen, unpacking cardboard shipping boxes on a table.

shots.startFramePrompt: Medium shot of the security guard holding a black grinder, looking at it with satisfaction.
shots.endFramePrompt: Same medium shot, he turns the grinder in his hands to examine it from different angles.
shots.actionPrompt: The security guard holds a new salt and pepper grinder set, inspecting it closely in his kitchen.

shots.startFramePrompt: Close-up of a table with a patterned cloth, a knife lying flat on it.
shots.endFramePrompt: Same close-up, a hand enters the frame and adjusts the position of the knife slightly.
shots.actionPrompt: A large kitchen knife is carefully placed onto a decorative patterned cloth on a table.

shots.startFramePrompt: Top-down close-up of a grill pan on a stove, hands pressing bread onto the ridges.
shots.endFramePrompt: Same close-up, the bread is being toasted, with steam or smoke beginning to rise.
shots.actionPrompt: Two slices of bread are being pressed down onto a hot grill pan by a pair of hands.

shots.startFramePrompt: Medium shot of a sandwich on a wooden board, a hand holding the top slice of bread above it.
shots.endFramePrompt: Same medium shot, the hand places the top slice onto the sandwich, completing it.
shots.actionPrompt: A gourmet sandwich with sliced meat and fresh greens is being assembled on a wooden cutting board.

shots.startFramePrompt: Close-up of a hand holding a half-sandwich, the cross-section of fillings is visible.
shots.endFramePrompt: Same close-up, the hand moves the sandwich slightly as if preparing for a bite.
shots.actionPrompt: A hand holds a piece of a gourmet sandwich, revealing the layers of meat and vegetables inside.

shots.startFramePrompt: Medium shot of the security guard eating, with a doorway visible behind him.
shots.endFramePrompt: Same medium shot, the second security guard is now walking through the doorway in the background.
shots.actionPrompt: The security guard eats his sandwich while another guard in a similar uniform walks past in the background.

shots.startFramePrompt: Close-up of the security guard's face, he has a bit of food in his mouth and looks sideways.
shots.endFramePrompt: Same close-up, his head is turned further, his expression shifting to one of surprise.
shots.actionPrompt: The security guard suddenly stops eating and turns his head to look at something off-camera.

shots.startFramePrompt: Over-the-shoulder shot from behind the first guard, focusing on the second guard standing and looking down.
shots.endFramePrompt: Same over-the-shoulder shot, the second guard gestures slightly as he speaks.
shots.actionPrompt: Over-the-shoulder shot of the first security guard as a second guard (name tag 'SHIELDS') talks to him about his sandwich.

shots.startFramePrompt: Wide shot of the security monitor room with both guards interacting.
shots.endFramePrompt: Same wide shot, the second guard takes a bite of his sandwich.
shots.actionPrompt: Both security guards are in the monitor room; the first guard sits while the second one stands and eats a sandwich.

shots.startFramePrompt: Close-up of the first security guard's face, looking up towards the second guard.
shots.endFramePrompt: Same close-up, his expression remains skeptical as he listens.
shots.actionPrompt: The first security guard looks slightly annoyed as he is interrupted during his meal.

shots.startFramePrompt: Close-up of the second security guard's face as he chews his food.
shots.endFramePrompt: Same close-up, he gives a slight nod while looking at the first guard.
shots.actionPrompt: The second security guard eats his sandwich and looks at his colleague with a nonchalant expression.

shots.startFramePrompt: Close-up of the first security guard's face as he begins to turn away.
shots.endFramePrompt: Same close-up, he is now looking directly ahead at the screens, his back to the camera.
shots.actionPrompt: The first security guard turns his attention back to the security monitors, dismissing the conversation.

shots.startFramePrompt: Close-up of a laptop screen displaying online shopping results for cookbooks.
shots.endFramePrompt: Same close-up, the screen is static on the cookbook results.
shots.actionPrompt: A laptop screen shows an Amazon Prime search for 'cookbooks' with various recipe book covers visible.

shots.startFramePrompt: Close-up of hands placing a cookbook on top of another on a kitchen table.
shots.endFramePrompt: Same close-up, the stack of three cookbooks is neatly arranged.
shots.actionPrompt: Hands stack several new cookbooks on a table, including one titled 'Spice Recipes'.

shots.startFramePrompt: Extreme close-up of a gas stove burner before it is lit.
shots.endFramePrompt: Same extreme close-up, the burner is now lit with vibrant blue flames.
shots.actionPrompt: A gas stove burner is ignited, with a ring of blue flames appearing instantly.

shots.startFramePrompt: Wide shot of the security guard in his kitchen, standing by the stove and bringing a spoon to his mouth.
shots.endFramePrompt: Same wide shot, he has tasted the food and looks thoughtful as he continues to cook.
shots.actionPrompt: In a blue-tiled kitchen, the security guard, wearing an apron, tastes food from a wooden spoon while cooking at the stove.

shots.startFramePrompt: Close-up of the security guard's face as he sips from a wooden spoon.
shots.endFramePrompt: Same close-up, he lowers the spoon, a look of satisfied concentration on his face.
shots.actionPrompt: The security guard carefully tastes his cooking, his expression focused and analytical.

shots.startFramePrompt: Wide shot of a dark hallway with a single beam of light projecting from the right.
shots.endFramePrompt: Same wide shot, the light beam has moved significantly, illuminating a different part of the hallway.
shots.actionPrompt: A bright flashlight beam cuts through the darkness of a grand hallway, scanning the area.

shots.startFramePrompt: Wide shot of the dark hallway with the flashlight beam creating a bright lens flare.
shots.endFramePrompt: Same wide shot, the light beam shifts slightly, maintaining its intensity.
shots.actionPrompt: The flashlight beam intensifies and points directly toward the camera in the dark hallway.

shots.startFramePrompt: Close-up of the security guard's face, his eyes wide and focused on the screens.
shots.endFramePrompt: Same close-up, he leans forward slightly, his expression becoming more serious.
shots.actionPrompt: The security guard looks alert and slightly concerned while watching the security monitors.

shots.startFramePrompt: Wide shot of the kitchen with smoke rising from the stove area and the guard reacting.
shots.endFramePrompt: Same wide shot, the smoke has filled more of the room as he continues to move around the stove.
shots.actionPrompt: Thick white smoke billows from the stove in the kitchen as the security guard tries to manage a small fire.

shots.startFramePrompt: Close-up of a cardboard box with blue tape, a knife edge just touching the tape.
shots.endFramePrompt: Same close-up, the knife has cut through the tape and the hand is moving away.
shots.actionPrompt: A hand uses a small knife to slice through the blue shipping tape on a cardboard box.

shots.startFramePrompt: Close-up of hands and a knife poised over a pile of herbs on a wooden board.
shots.endFramePrompt: Same close-up, the herbs are now finely chopped.
shots.actionPrompt: Hands skillfully chop fresh green herbs on a wooden cutting board with a large knife.

shots.startFramePrompt: POV shot from the back of an oven, looking out at the security guard reaching in.
shots.endFramePrompt: Same POV shot, the tray is being pulled forward and out of the oven.
shots.actionPrompt: POV shot from inside an oven as the security guard, wearing mitts, pulls out a tray of golden-brown food.

shots.startFramePrompt: Close-up of a pan on a stove, the contents beginning to sizzle.
shots.endFramePrompt: Same close-up, the food has been tossed and is now more evenly distributed in the pan.
shots.actionPrompt: Food is being sautéed in a dark frying pan on a gas stove, with steam rising.

shots.startFramePrompt: Close-up of a hand holding a lemon half over an unseen dish.
shots.endFramePrompt: Same close-up, the hand has squeezed the lemon, and juice is flowing out.
shots.actionPrompt: A hand squeezes a half-lemon, with juice spraying and dripping down.

shots.startFramePrompt: Extreme close-up of the lemon as it is being compressed by a hand.
shots.endFramePrompt: Same extreme close-up, the squeezing action continues with more juice visible.
shots.actionPrompt: A close-up of the lemon being squeezed further, showing the texture of the fruit and the juice.

shots.startFramePrompt: Low-angle close-up of the security guard's face as he begins to raise his arm.
shots.endFramePrompt: Same close-up, he is now wiping his brow with his forearm.
shots.actionPrompt: The security guard wipes sweat from his forehead with his arm, looking exhausted but determined.

shots.startFramePrompt: Wide establishing shot of a subway station platform with a train stopped at the tracks.
shots.endFramePrompt: Same wide shot, the train remains stationary at the platform.
shots.actionPrompt: A train sits at a station platform at night, with city lights visible in the distance.

shots.startFramePrompt: Close-up of a hand holding a smartphone displaying a video player interface.
shots.endFramePrompt: Same close-up, the video on the phone screen continues to play.
shots.actionPrompt: A smartphone screen shows an Amazon Prime video titled 'James May: Oh Cook' featuring a cooking demonstration.

shots.startFramePrompt: Medium shot of the guard sitting on a blue bench in a dimly lit station, looking down at his phone.
shots.endFramePrompt: Same medium shot, he looks up slightly as if checking for his train.
shots.actionPrompt: The security guard, now in his dark uniform jacket, sits on a subway station bench and checks his phone.

shots.startFramePrompt: Close-up of a glass bowl with eggs, a whisk just starting to move.
shots.endFramePrompt: Same close-up, the eggs are now being vigorously whisked into a frothy mixture.
shots.actionPrompt: A metal whisk rapidly beats a mixture of yellow eggs in a clear glass bowl.

shots.startFramePrompt: Close-up of a mille-feuille pastry, sugar beginning to fall from above.
shots.endFramePrompt: Same close-up, the pastry is now lightly dusted with white powdered sugar.
shots.actionPrompt: Powdered sugar is sifted over a beautifully layered pastry topped with fresh raspberries.

shots.startFramePrompt: Close-up of the second guard's face, a slight smile forming.
shots.endFramePrompt: Same close-up, he looks pleased and relaxed.
shots.actionPrompt: The second security guard smiles to himself while sitting in the monitor room.

shots.startFramePrompt: Close-up of the first guard's face, his eyes lighting up.
shots.endFramePrompt: Same close-up, he breaks into a full, happy grin.
shots.actionPrompt: The first security guard beams with a wide, genuine smile, looking very satisfied.

shots.startFramePrompt: Wide shot of the monitor room as the first guard begins to stand.
shots.endFramePrompt: Same wide shot, the first guard has walked out of frame, leaving the second guard alone.
shots.actionPrompt: The first security guard stands up and leaves the monitor room while the second guard continues to eat.

shots.startFramePrompt: Wide shot of a dark street at night, the guard walking towards a restaurant.
shots.endFramePrompt: Same wide shot, he has walked past the restaurant's entrance.
shots.actionPrompt: The security guard walks down a city sidewalk at night, passing a restaurant with a glowing 'FUEGO' sign.

shots.startFramePrompt: Close-up of a window with a white paper sign that reads 'CHEF WANTED'.
shots.endFramePrompt: Same close-up, the sign remains centered in the frame.
shots.actionPrompt: A 'CHEF WANTED' sign is visible through the window of the FUEGO restaurant.

shots.startFramePrompt: Close-up of the guard's face against a blurred city background.
shots.endFramePrompt: Same close-up, text overlays his face as the screen fades slightly.
shots.actionPrompt: The security guard looks forward with a hopeful expression as the 'Shopping. It's on prime' logo appears.
